title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972. 1[(2) It extends to the whole of India 2***.] (3) It shall come into force in a State or Union territory to which it extends3*** on such date as the Central Government may, by notification, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act or for different States or Union territories.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 4, ibid., for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 2-10-1991). 2. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10-2019). 3. The words ",or may become extended in future," omitted by s. 4, ibid. (w.e.f. 2-10-1991).
